title: chance

messages.description: a bang to be passed or not
updates arguments if more than 1 is given
sets chance number if only one argument

methods.description: a float sets seed, no float sets a unique internal

body: When [chance] receives a bang, it outputs to an outlet according to its chance (probability weight). The total number is the sum of all arguments. It also has an index mode where it outputs the outlet index number instead.
